title: Revest Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack on ERC1155 minting contract allowing attacker to add funds to existing positions

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls depositAdditionalToFNFT() after a mintAddressLock() in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls depositAdditionalToFNFT() after a mintAddressLock() in the same tx
summary: Revest Finance fell victim to a reentrancy attack where an attacker exploited a vulnerability in the ERC1155 minting contract to add funds to existing positions. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent further losses.
